description: ModerateContent provides an image moderation service that rates images for inappropriate content such as nudity. Its website presents a free public API for submitting image URLs for moderation.
summary: moderatecontent.com exposes one public HTTP API: an Image Moderation REST API documented by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec at `https://www.moderatecontent.com/api/swagger.yaml` (JSON mirror via APIs.guru).
